summary: Partner Dropdown in Create Organization feature tested. Backend: 5/5 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Partner dropdown now visible in Create Organization modal for super_admin users, shows 'None (No Partner)' default and lists all available partners (Calendar Systems, Test Partner). Fixed timing bug in frontend where partners weren't loading due to empty dependency array in useFocusEffect.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/frontend/app/admin/organizations.tsx - The loadPartners() call was inside useFocusEffect with empty dependency array [], so it only ran once on mount when isSuperAdmin might not be true yet. Changed to use separate useEffect with [isSuperAdmin] dependency to properly load partners when user role is confirmed.
Backend POST /api/admin/organizations correctly handles optional partner_id field for super_admin
Backend automatically updates partner's organization_ids list when org is created with partner_id
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed organizations during testing (can be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner dropdown feature in Create Organization modal is fully working. Frontend fix applied: useEffect with [isSuperAdmin] dependency loads partners correctly. Backend was already working correctly - accepts optional partner_id, auto-links org to partner, and updates partner's organization_ids list.

backend.create_org_with_partner_id: PASS - POST /api/admin/organizations accepts partner_id, links org to partner
backend.create_org_without_partner_id: PASS - Still works normally when no partner_id provided
backend.partner_org_ids_updated: PASS - Partner's organization_ids list is updated automatically
backend.list_partners_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/admin/partners returns all partners (Calendar Systems, Test Partner)
backend.organization_create_model: PASS - OrganizationCreate Pydantic model includes optional partner_id field

frontend.create_modal_opens: PASS - + button opens Create Organization modal
frontend.partner_dropdown_visible: PASS - 'White-Label Partner' field visible for super_admin
frontend.partner_dropdown_options: PASS - Shows Calendar Systems and Test Partner options
frontend.form_submission: PASS - Form can be filled and submitted

bug_fixed.description: Partners not loading in Create Organization modal
bug_fixed.root_cause: useFocusEffect callback with empty dependency array [] caused loadPartners() to only run once on mount, when isSuperAdmin was likely still undefined/false before auth store loaded
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added separate useEffect with [isSuperAdmin] dependency to properly trigger loadPartners() when user role is confirmed
